environment.checkout_type: new local Git clone without local object sharing, outside the Drive tree

command: git clone --no-local <repo> <temp-clone>; git checkout 0788a6e; ./scripts/bootstrap.sh; ./scripts/verify.sh; git status --porcelain=v1
